__data__.text:
John Mahfouz Hanna 
 
Mobile: 01276975240 | Email: johnmahfouzhanna@gmail.com | Linkedin: www.linkedin.com/in/johnmahfouz 
Github: https://github.com/JohnMahfouz | Address: Heliopolis, Cairo | Military status: Postponed 
I am a motivated Computer Science student with a passion for machine learning and data science 
applications. Skilled in Python, data preprocessing, model development, and evaluation, with hands-on 
project experience. Eager to apply analytical and technical skills in a collaborative environment and 
contribute to data-driven decision-making and AI-powered solutions. 
Education 
Bachelor’s Degree student of Computer & Information Sciences – Computer Science Department – Ain 
Shams University. Egypt (2022-2026) (CGPA 3.046) 
Courses & Certificates 
• Advanced Learning Algorithms– Coursera 
• Supervised Machine Learning: Regression & Classification – Coursera 
• Unsupervised Learning, Recommenders, Reinforcement Learning – Coursera 
• Machine Learning Summer Training – Ain Shams University  
• Data Analysis – UDACITY  
Projects 
• SmartStock AI – Retail Demand Forecasting 
- Developed a machine learning-based demand forecasting system using XGBoost, 
incorporating calendar and seasonal features specific to the Egyptian retail market. 
-  Engineered features for Ramadan, Eid, weekends, and payday effects; achieved up to 
95% revenue prediction accuracy. 
- Developed an interactive Streamlit dashboard that allows users to input daily 
conditions and receive real-time forecasts, recommendations, and visualizations. 
 
• Website Reviews Sentiment Analysis  
- Built an end-to-end deep learning pipeline to classify website user reviews into five 
sentiment levels using neural networks. 
-  Preprocessed text data through cleaning, normalization, intelligent stopword handling, 
and vectorization using Keras TextVectorization. 
-  Implemented and evaluated multiple models using cross-validation, with metrics like 
MSE and R2. Visualized model performance with scatter plots of actual vs. predicted 
sales.

• Steam Video Game Sales Analysis 
- Built a machine learning pipeline to predict Steam game sales (copies sold) using a dataset 
with game metadata, sales, and review data. 
-  Preprocessed data by handling missing values, binarizing categorical features (genres, 
platforms), and removing outliers. 
-  Implemented and evaluated multiple models using cross-validation, with metrics like 
MSE and R2. Visualized model performance with scatter plots of actual vs. predicted 
sales. 
• Question Tagging  
- Developed an NLP-based multi-label classification system to predict programming-related 
tags for Stack Overflow questions.  
- Preprocessed question text using BeautifulSoup, Snowball stemming, and WordNet 
lemmatization, with TF-IDF vectorization for feature extraction. Trained and evaluated 
classifiers (Logistic Regression, Multinomial Naive Bayes, SGD, SVM) using 
OneVsRestClassifier.  
 
• Speaker Identification 
- Built a C# Speaker Identification System to recognize users based on their voice 
characteristics using MFCC feature extraction and Dynamic Time Warping (DTW). 
- Implemented DTW-based sequence matching algorithms (with and without pruning) to 
measure similarity between input and stored voice templates for user identification. 
• Shahid app 
-  A media streaming platform that allows users to browse and watch movies, TV shows, 
and live content. 
- A Users can securely sign up, log in, manage subscriptions, add items to a watchlist, 
search for content, and rate what they watch. 
• FOS ( Operating System ) 
- Implemented core OS concepts including memory management (paging, segmentation, 
virtual memory), process synchronization, and user/kernel mode security. 
Technical skills 
• Languages: Python, Java, C/C++, SQL, Scala.

Technical skills 
• Languages: Python, Java, C/C++, SQL, Scala. 
• Machine Learning & AI: Scikit-learn: TensorFlow, XGBoost, NLP, Deep Learning 
• Data Analysis & Visualization: Power BI, Pandas, NumPy, Matplotlib 
• Developer Tools: VS code, Visual Studio, PyCharm, IntelliJ, Git 
Extracurricular Activities  
• Scout Group Leader – Led and coordinated activities for 120+ children (ages 9–13), developing 
leadership, communication, teamwork, and organizational skills.

Job Description: Junior Machine Learning Engineer
About the Role

We are seeking a motivated Junior Machine Learning Engineer with strong foundations in machine learning, data analysis, and applied AI. The ideal candidate has hands-on experience building end-to-end ML pipelines, working with real datasets, and translating business problems into data-driven solutions.

Responsibilities

Design, develop, and evaluate machine learning models for prediction, classification, and forecasting tasks

Perform data preprocessing, feature engineering, and exploratory data analysis

Build and optimize ML pipelines using Python and modern ML frameworks

Apply supervised and unsupervised learning techniques to real-world datasets

Evaluate models using appropriate metrics (MSE, R, accuracy, etc.) and cross-validation

Develop data visualizations and dashboards to communicate insights effectively

Collaborate with team members to deploy and improve AI-powered solutions

Required Skills & Qualifications

Strong proficiency
